title: CurveSwap - Open App
meta_description: curveswap opens the official Curve DEX for wallet-based token swaps; verify the domain, choose assets, and launch the app.
hero_h2: Open Curve's DEX swap flow in fewer clicks
hero_lead: curveswap gives searchers a direct, app-first route to the official Curve DEX for wallet-based token swaps, without invented rates, APY claims, or proxy promises.
what_is: CurveSwap is an app-first destination for users looking for Curve's token swap flow, with the primary action routed to the official Curve DEX. Use the Curve documentation for protocol background before signing transactions.

how.d: Use the app button and confirm the browser shows www.curve.finance before connecting a wallet.
Choose a self-custody wallet supported by the app and make sure it is on the intended network.
Enter the token pair, review the pool or route, and check price impact or slippage displayed by the app.
Approve token spending only when required, then confirm the swap from your wallet.

points.p: The primary call to action sends users to the official Curve DEX at curve.finance before any wallet signature.
The page stays focused on token exchange flow, pool selection, slippage review, and wallet confirmation rather than unverified yield claims.
Check the domain, token contract, route, and wallet prompt before approving any transaction.

faq.a: curveswap is a search term for users looking for Curve's swap experience; this page routes to the official Curve DEX and keeps educational context separate from the app.

faq.q: Is curveswap the official Curve app?
faq.a: No. This landing page is not the official app; use www.curve.finance/dex/ for the Curve DEX and verify the domain.

faq.q: Does curveswap set fees or APY?
faq.a: No. Swap fees, routes, price impact, and available pools are shown by the live app and can change by network, pool, and market conditions.

faq.q: Which wallet should I use with curveswap?
faq.a: Use a self-custody wallet you control and review Ethereum wallet basics at ethereum.org before signing transactions.

faq.q: Can I swap stablecoins with curveswap?
faq.a: Curve is known for liquidity pools used by stable and pegged assets, but always check the available pool, route, and token contracts in the app before trading.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify www.curve.finance before connecting a wallet; educational content only, not financial advice.
